generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies' reluctance to meet their defense spending commitments is directly undermining our national security? While we maintain our end of the bargain, key partners are leaving us vulnerable. It's time to demand accountability - our safety shouldn't be a one-way street. #AllianceAccountability #NationalSecurityFirst
